## S1.02 Splash Data to Know {#s1.02-splash-data-to-know}

**Owner:** Directors · **Last reviewed:** 2025 board (imported from the Hitchhiker's Guide, July 2026) · **Status:** current — when you find something stale, fix it and update this line.

Below is Splash data that is useful to consider when trying to figure out how many people attend Splash, how many teachers teach, what yield is etc…

Some important things to note:

* The grade breakdown of students that attend Splash (see graph below)--this is super important because it shows us that we need a lot of classes for middle schoolers, but that any class taught only for 12 grade will be very unpopular.  
* The “Number of Class Hours (Capacity)” refers to the sum of Class Size Capacity\*Length of the Class\*Number of Sections for all classes that are registered; this is the most important metric for teacher registration because it tells you the capacity of students that can attend (the Number of Class Hours (filled) refers to how many of those hours were filled up; this is always much lower in part due to the fact that Number of Class Hours (Capacity) doesn’t account for the fact that we don’t always have enough large lecture halls to hold the maximum number of students that could potentially attend and also due to our yield)

Another note: Fall 18 was a smaller Splash in terms of attendance, even though the \# of preregistered students was around the average. It was a rainy day, which often means low yield.

| Category | Spring 19 | Fall 18 | Spring 18 | % Change from Fall 18 | % Change from Spring 18 |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Number of students Pre-registered (Clicked "Confirm") | 1084 | 874 | 898 | 124% | 120.7% |
| Number of students Attended | 817 | 597 | 739 | 136.8% | 110.5% |
| % Yield | 75.3% | 68.3% | 82.2% | 110.2% | 91.6% |
| Number of Teachers | 161 | 118 | 123 | 136.4% | 130.8% |
| Number of Sections | 252 | 192 | 216 | 131.2% | 116.6% |
| Number of Class Hours (Capacity) | 8460 | 8135 | 7422 | 103.9% | 113.9% |
| Number of Class Hours (Filled) | 5451 | 4770 | 4896 | 114.2% | 111.3% |
| Student surveys | 339 | 273 | 309 | 124.1% | 109.7% |
| Student survey yield | 41.3% | 31.2% | 41.8% | 132.3% | 98.8% |
| Financial Aid Grants | 224 | 208 | 144 | 107.6% | 155.5% |
| % Pre-Registered Students on Financial Aid | 41.3% | 23.7% | 16% | 174.2% | 258.1% |
